source: 20 s-only SPOC independent cadence check; not used in adopted transit fit
error: Both mast.stsci.edu and archive.stsci.edu unreachable: timeout and SSL WRONG_VERSION_NUMBER on all HTTPS attempts (Python urllib verify_ssl=True and False, PowerShell Invoke-WebRequest). DNS resolves correctly (130.167.220.112) but TCP/TLS connections fail. Other hosts (exoplanetarchive.ipac.caltech.edu, google.com) work normally.
diagnosis: Network-level firewall blocking STScI IP range. Not a Python TLS configuration issue.
interpretation: No 20 s independent cadence check can be performed until network access to MAST/STScI is restored. Re-run this script when the firewall block is resolved. The adopted transit fit and all vetting results are unaffected because they use only 120 s SPOC products that were previously downloaded.
recommended_alternatives: Alternative network (VPN, institutional guest network, home connection).
Pre-download 20 s FITS files externally and place in D:\exoplanet\data\spoc_20s\ for local analysis.
Use the NASA Exoplanet Archive TAP service (exoplanetarchive.ipac.caltech.edu) if 20 s cadence data becomes available there.
